content.mainTitle: Free YouTube to MP4 Converter - Download HD Videos Online
content.intro1: Y2mate is a free online YouTube to MP4 converter that works directly in your browser—no app installation, no registration required. Download YouTube videos instantly on any device.
content.intro2: Choose from multiple quality options: 360p, 720p HD, 1080p Full HD, and even 2K/4K when available. Y2mate supports unlimited downloads with no file size restrictions—simple, fast, and completely free.

instructions.title: How to download YouTube as MP4
steps: Copy the YouTube video URL from your browser or enter a search keyword directly.
Paste the link into the search box above and hit Start to begin processing.
Review available MP4 formats—360p for quick downloads, 720p/1080p for high definition, or 2K/4K when supported.
Tap your chosen quality and the MP4 file will download automatically to your device.

items.question: What is Y2mate MP4 Converter?
items.answer: Y2mate is a free online YouTube to MP4 converter that specializes in video downloads. Convert YouTube videos to MP4 format in multiple resolutions—360p for small files, 720p/1080p for HD quality, and 2K/4K when available from the source. No software installation required.

items.question: Is Y2mate MP4 download free?
items.answer: Yes, Y2mate offers completely free YouTube to MP4 conversion with no hidden costs. Download unlimited videos without file size restrictions, daily quotas, or subscription fees. All MP4 quality options are available at no charge.

items.question: Why can't I get 4K or 60fps on every video?
items.answer: Higher resolutions and frame rates depend on the original upload. Some videos simply don't include 4K/60fps, or they use formats that require separate merging.

items.question: Why does my download have no sound?
items.answer: If you pick a video‑only stream by mistake, select a quality that includes audio. When separate tracks are used, they're merged automatically during conversion.

items.question: How do I save MP4 to Photos on iPhone?
items.answer: Download with Safari, find the file in the Files app, then Share → Save Video to add it to Photos. On Android, check Downloads or your Gallery app.

items.question: How can I reduce file size?
items.answer: Choose a lower resolution (e.g., 360p/720p) to shrink file size. Shorter clips also finish faster on slower connections.

items.question: Can I download Shorts or live streams?
items.answer: Shorts are supported like regular videos. Live streams are available once YouTube finishes processing the recording.
